ui.title: EE Operational Summary
ui.desc: Show all EE Operational Summary transactions here.

data.sql: SELECT C_UNIT_CODE,METRIC_LABEL,VL FROM (SELECT C_UNIT_CODE,'Total Active Financing' AS METRIC_LABEL,ROUND(SUM(FA_TTL_LOAN_AMT)) AS VL FROM EXIMTRX.FAEF_MASTER WHERE C_TRX_STATUS = 'M' AND FA_TTL_LOAN_AMT IS NOT NULL GROUP BY C_UNIT_CODE UNION ALL SELECT C_UNIT_CODE, 'Total Invoice Value' AS METRIC_LABEL,ROUND(SUM(FA_TTL_LOAN_BAL)) AS VL FROM EXIMTRX.FAEF_MASTER WHERE FA_TTL_LOAN_BAL IS NOT NULL GROUP BY C_UNIT_CODE UNION ALL SELECT C_UNIT_CODE,'New customer onboarding' AS METRIC_LABEL, COUNT(SELF_ENROL) AS VL FROM EXIMTRX.FADA_PRE_CREDIT GROUP BY C_UNIT_CODE ORDER BY C_UNIT_CODE)
